requestedAction: Execute owner-controlled Instagram OAuth for @agdigitalz in connected_draft_only mode only.
scope: If converted into an active approved lock later, this may allow one owner-controlled Instagram OAuth connection for @agdigitalz in connected_draft_only mode only. It does not authorize posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, credential storage in repo, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner revokes it, expiration passes, the target handle differs from @agdigitalz, the target platform differs from Instagram, the connection mode differs from connected_draft_only, the secure credential store is not approved, requested permissions expand beyond the approval, or any posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears.

evidence.reference: Owner must provide exact future approval for Instagram OAuth execution.
